creator: dyeske@yahoo.com
text:
update to 0.0.9 which has a scons based build system

Fix: 

remove these two files
files/patch-src::yafraycore::buffer.h
files/patch-configure

apply this patch
http://futurebsd.sourceforge.net/freebsd/ports/patch-yafray

add these files to the files directory
http://futurebsd.sourceforge.net/freebsd/ports/patch-SConstruct
http://futurebsd.sourceforge.net/freebsd/ports/patch-freebsd-settings.py
http://futurebsd.sourceforge.net/freebsd/ports/patch-src_yafraycore_y_alloc.h
http://futurebsd.sourceforge.net/freebsd/ports/patch-src_yafraycore_threadedscene.cc
